    UseOperationContractRule.computeParams(Term baseHeapTerm, Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, LocationVariable baseHeap, UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst, TermFactory tf)

    static ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract>
    UseOperationContractRule.getApplicableContracts(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst, Services services)
    Returns the operation contracts which are applicable for the passed instantiation.
